title: Kill Effects
description: Adds client sided kill effects and custom critical hit particles
body:
# KillFX

![general](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4fdd24a540c92a438eaddda24a648ed81eeb924_0.webp)

**Fully client-side, ridiculously customizable kill effects for Minecraft.**

Trigger **real lightning**, **3D skin-matched ghosts**, **custom PNG particles**, **fireworks**, **shockwaves**, and more the instant something dies — plus fully customizable **critical hit particles** and **hit sounds**.

**No server install. No packets. Works on any server.**

> Fabric • 1.21.4 • 1.21.10 • 1.21.11 • Java 21

---

## What is KillFX?

KillFX is a fully client-side cosmetic mod that plays visual effects whenever an entity dies.

Everything is rendered locally on your client:

- No server installation required
- No packets sent
- No gameplay changes
- Safe to use on any multiplayer server

Rather than being a single effect, KillFX is a complete customization toolkit with editable presets, entity filters, custom particles, and sound effects.

---

# Kill Effects

Create anything from simple kill flashes to over-the-top cinematic effects.

### Included Effects

- **Real Lightning**
  - Spawns a client-side `minecraft:lightning_bolt`
  - Uses vanilla lightning visuals and thunder
  - No damage or fire

- **3D Ghosts**
  - Creates a translucent, skin-matched ghost of the victim
  - Floats upward and fades away

- **Custom PNG Particles**
  - Import your own PNG images
  - Render them as custom billboard particles

- **Additional Effects**
  - Fireworks
  - Particle bursts
  - Shockwaves
  - Floating text
  - And more

### Advanced Customization

![Effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ff685b6964a7797f14c562dc7097ca88628df96_0.webp)

Every effect supports:

- Full RGB color control
- Size scaling
- Particle count
- Lifetime
- Motion settings
- Gravity
- Glow effects
- Trails
- Additive blending

### Presets

Includes built-in presets such as:

- PvP
- Cosmic
- Fire
- Lightning
- Minimal

Or create your own from scratch.

### Filters

Only trigger effects when:

- Players die
- Mobs die
- Specific entities die
- Custom conditions are met

---

# Critical Hits

Replace Minecraft's vanilla crit particle with your own custom design.

### Custom PNG Crit Particles

![Crits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/395b64f4ddbf8702515a43017c037ad394acbc37_0.webp)

Import any PNG and customize:

- Size
- Opacity
- Particle count
- Rotation
- RGB colors
- Rainbow mode
- Additive blending
- Trails
- Gravity
- Spread

Includes a one-click **"Match Vanilla"** option.

### Configuration Tabs

- Setup
- Appearance
- Motion
- Texture

---

# Hit Sounds

Play a custom sound whenever you land a hit.

### Features

- Choose from built-in sounds
- Import your own `.ogg` files
- Volume control
- Pitch control
- Crit-only playback
- ▶ Sound preview button

### Vanilla Sound Override

Mute Minecraft's default hit and crit sounds so your custom sound completely replaces them.

---

# Share Your Setup

Export and import your entire configuration.

Includes:

- Global settings
- All presets
- Effect configurations
- Crit particle settings
- Sound settings

Configurations can be copied directly to the clipboard or saved to a file for easy sharing.

---

# Quality & Compatibility

### Built for Multiple Versions

Supports:

- Minecraft 1.21.4
- Minecraft 1.21.10
- Minecraft 1.21.11

All versions are built from a single source using proper production mappings.

### Modern Codebase

- Java 21
- Fabric
- Mixins
- Tested before release

### Easy Configuration

Access settings through:

- A dedicated keybind
- Mod Menu integration

---

# Installation

### Requirements

- Fabric Loader 0.16+
- Fabric API

### Steps

1. Install Fabric Loader and Fabric API for your Minecraft version.
2. Download the matching `killfx-<version>+<mc>.jar` from the latest release.
3. Place the file inside your `mods/` folder.
4. Launch Minecraft.

### Optional

Install Mod Menu for quick access from the Mods screen, or assign the KillFX keybind in Controls.

---

**Create anything from subtle PvP effects to complete visual chaos — all client-side, all customizable, and compatible with any server.**
